item.g:title: DODCHmellow Cloud Shampoo
item.g:description: Imagine a lather so dense and soft it feels like a whipped cloud. Sulfate-Free shampoo with Silk-Polymer infusion and pH 5.5. Designed for ultra-gentle cleaning with a premium Néroli-Sucre fragrance.

item.g:title: DODCH Foaming Cleanser
item.g:description: A gentle yet powerful daily cleanser with AHA + BHA exfoliation, hydrating Panthenol & Glycerin, and soothing Allantoin for pure, luminous skin.

item.g:title: Advanced HA Serum
item.g:description: Concentrated Hyaluronic Acid serum for deep multi-layer hydration, instant plumping, and radiant Mediterranean skin. Engineered to treat fine lines, dryness, and dullness for all skin types.

item.g:title: Pro-V Silk Therapy Mask
item.g:description: Intensive hair repair mask infused with Hydrolyzed Silk and Pro-Vitamin B5. Designed to restore strength, add mirror-like shine, and provide deep hydration. Mediterranean luxury for silky, frizz-free hair results.
